subscores.label: Hook (first 2s)
subscores.note: Opens on the title card over the first clip. Stronger would be a striking shot before the title lands.

subscores.label: Pacing
subscores.note: Three clips, ~4s each. Tighten the middle clip to keep energy up.

subscores.label: Captions
subscores.note: Caption present at the end; extend coverage across the whole video for muted viewing.

subscores.label: Safe areas
subscores.note: Text and captions respect the platform UI zones.

subscores.label: Length
subscores.note: ~11s — on the short side; 15-25s gives the story more room.

subscores.label: Audio
subscores.note: No music bed. Add an upbeat track and duck it under any voice.

subscores.label: Ending
subscores.note: Lands on the Osaka clip with the JAPAN caption — clear closing beat.

fixes.fix: Add a music bed — short-form with no audio underperforms badly.
Lead with your most striking 1-2s shot, then bring in the title.
Caption the whole video, not just the closing line.
